title: Eva tattoo
wikitext:
[]: Eva tattoo             Quote Post by Paragon » Mon Nov 15, 2010 9:00 pm So, a friend of mine wants to get an Eva tattoo. I've insisted she make it something easily visually recognizable as from Eva, but we haven't thought of anything that would both be recognizable and have the kind of message she wants to implant in her skin. Oddly, the only thing she's been able to think of so far is the kanji for "silence" from EoE, but I've insisted that would make everyone who sees it thinks she's one of those dumbasses who gets a Japanese tattoo without knowing what it means. Anyone have suggestions?

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Mon Nov 15, 2010 10:31 pm Sammael. Tell me that wouldn't be a bitchin' tattoo.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Nov 15, 2010 11:04 pm A vulva on her forehead, with an eye in it.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Nov 15, 2010 11:46 pm some suggestions: A thin red line of scar tissue extending on top and bottom of her arm from the gap between her middle and ring fingers all the way to her shoulder/armpit. Two long, thin diamond-shaped entry wounds in parallel near her left eye earns bonus points. A core (and mini cores) on her solar plexus Entry plug apparatus on her neck/upper back Misato's cross necklace on sternum, with fake chain If you're really nuts, go for a full-body plugsuit tattoo!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 16, 2010 2:04 am There was a massive whole-back work as a Gainax toppage a while back (spring '06). You might dig around here -- http://drinian.org/dump/gainaxtoppage/ -- to find it.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Nov 16, 2010 2:12 am ^ you aren't referring to the guy with the "eva 01 pulling apart the ATF... on butt cheeks" one, are you? That was frightening.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 16, 2010 2:56 am That's the one .

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Nov 16, 2010 11:34 am A huge solid kind of damaged red cross Lilith was pinned on the back and shoulders. May contradict with religions, though.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Nov 16, 2010 4:57 pm Since she's a girl, I'll only help after I hear where the tattoo will be.

[]:             Quote Post by Aozora » Tue Nov 16, 2010 4:59 pm The Nerv leaf, or an angel's mask or any other simple symbol.

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Wed Nov 17, 2010 3:41 am Aozora wrote: The Nerv leaf, or an angel's mask or any other simple symbol.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Wed Nov 17, 2010 8:31 am Vulva palms.

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Thu Nov 18, 2010 3:38 am heres a terrible one but it happens to be something i just thought of... its a duo pair, if she has a boyfriend whose also into eva have the entry plug tattoed onto his male genitalia and get the eva spine tattoed to the female genitalia.... then u can always have the "hey baby i heard that our sync rates are off the charts" and other eva related crazy sex talk...

[]:             Quote Post by Born of Lilith » Fri Nov 19, 2010 3:59 am I want a Rei tattoo so bad. When I have the funds, I'm so gonna make it happen. I might get this tattooed on me.

[]:             Quote Post by Nightweaver20xx » Fri Nov 19, 2010 10:57 am [url]http://www.todoketai.org/foro_tk/index.php?topic=18336.0[/url] Some examples (most from other anime). Some guy also got one of Asuka and Rei sitting on a cross that he showed to Tiffany Grant at a convention, but I never saw what it looked like.

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Fri Nov 19, 2010 12:01 pm the only person i know personally with an Eva tattoo is my friend Mac, who got this a few years ago: i'm kind of thinking about getting one myself. the Sammael idea is definitely awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Fri Nov 19, 2010 10:25 pm lilim wrote: the only person i know personally with an Eva tattoo is my friend Mac, who got this a few years ago:

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Sat Nov 20, 2010 12:36 am haha xD yeah the hand is pretty bad. i'm not sure where he got it done. but at least the kimono and water is nicer to look at. and BOTH hands aren't showing so they didn't have the opportunity to give her two claws, thank God.

[]:             Quote Post by StellarKei » Sat Nov 20, 2010 12:38 am A well known cosplayer, Ginny McQueen, has a 00 tattoo on her because she apparently is a huge fan of Rei

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Sun Nov 21, 2010 7:59 am A choice of rather discrete one could be Misato's scar
